notes: EMA trend pullback: buy dips in uptrend. Price above 200 EMA, pulled back below 50 EMA, RSI oversold, ADX confirms trend.
EMA trend pullback: sell bounces in downtrend. Price below 200 EMA, bounced above 50 EMA, RSI overbought, ADX confirms trend.
London session breakout: buy when price breaks to top of range during London session with expanding volatility and above-average volume.
London session breakout: sell when price breaks to bottom of range during London session with expanding volatility and above-average volume.
NY session breakout: buy during NY session when price at top of range, strong bullish DI, with volume confirmation.
NY session breakout: sell during NY session when price at bottom of range, strong bearish DI, with volume confirmation.
ADX trend + PSAR confirmation: buy when ADX shows strong trend, bullish DI dominates, PSAR bullish, price above 50 EMA.
ADX trend + PSAR confirmation: sell when ADX shows strong trend, bearish DI dominates, PSAR bearish, price below 50 EMA.
Swing high breakout: price close to swing high (breaking out), RSI shows momentum without overbought, bullish DI confirms.
Swing low breakout: price close to swing low (breaking down), RSI shows bearish momentum without oversold, bearish DI confirms.
